MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2022 Vacated

Defendant Uber Technologies, Inc.?S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or To Compel Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-30-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Blair Senesi, Esq. (no information provided) for Defendant/Moving Party.
No other appearances.

Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or To Compel Discovery:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS OR TO COMPEL DISCOVERY IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION AS FOLLOWS:
(1) PLAINTIFF, WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER WIIL DELIVER TO DEFENANT WITHOUT OBJECTION FULL AND COMPLETE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT/S DISCOVERY REQUESTS INCLUDING COPIES OF ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS REQUESTED..
(2) PLAINTIFF, WITH FIFTEEN (15) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER WILL SUBMIT TO A DEPOSITION AT A TIME AND PLACE CHOSEN BY PLAINTIFF.
(3) THE COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION OF THIS MATTER AND, IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE TERMS OF PARAGRAPHS (1) & (2) ABOVE DEFENDANT MAY SUBMIT AN ORDER TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com) GRANTING TERMINATING SANCTIONS DISMISSING THE MATTER WITH PREJUDICE.
(4) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NO MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST EITHER PARTY.

The court will review the proposed order submitted by the prevailing party.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
